LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS BY DEFENDANT SARI SMITH AL AFIFI. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- DEFENDANT SARI SMITH AL AFIFI'S MOTION TO QUASH IS DENIED. 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER.

calendar.matters:
Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendant Sari Smith Al Afifi; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites
Off Calendar Aug-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Defendant SARI SMITH AL AFIFI's motion to quash is denied. Process server declaration sufficient to meet burden. 5 days leave to answer. (AJR/301/kh) Karen Farnsworth, CSR 5162

Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendant Sari Smith Al Afifi; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites
Off Calendar Aug-12-2002 Continued To Aug-14-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearances, the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the Court: Defendant SARI SMITH AL AFIFI's motion to quash service of summons -- CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2002. Plaintiff to lodge courtesy copies of opposition by August 12th at noon with a cover letter referencing the continued hearing date. (ajr/301/kh) Susan Crozier CSR# 4761
